title: vitis orientalis
intro: Vitis orientalis, also known as Oriental Grape, is a type of plant belonging to the grape family (Vitaceae) and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vitis orientalis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Vitis orientalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
